notes: Language Server wave in closure phase. LSP 3.17 stub retired: compiler/lsp/ implements the full LSP surface — types.go (protocol shapes), transport.go (Content-Length framing), docstore.go (didOpen/didChange/didClose model), server.go (dispatch loop + initialize/shutdown/exit), diagnostics.go (parse-on-edit publish pipeline), handlers.go (hover/goto/completion/documentSymbol/workspaceSymbol/codeAction), semantic_tokens.go (packed-stream encoder). Ten tests cover every wave-doc Verify command: TestLspTransport, TestLspInitialize, TestLspDocSync, TestLspDiagnosticsStream, TestLspQuickFixes, TestLspHover, TestLspGotoDefinition, TestLspDocumentSymbols, TestLspCompletion, TestLspSemanticTokens. The scripted-session e2e (TestLspScriptedSession) launches `fuse lsp` as a subprocess, plays initialize → didOpen → hover → goto → completion → documentSymbol → shutdown → exit, and asserts each response. cmd/fuse gains a `lsp` subcommand running lsp.New over stdin/stdout. STUBS.md W19 history block appended; WC019 logged using Rule 10.2 mandated 6-field template. Thirteenth full wave under Rule 9.5 three-commit discipline: P00 audit (1b59c7a), implementation (06ebcac), PCL (this commit). Next: enter W20 Stdlib core.
